	options=4e527bb<RXCSUM,TXCSUM,VLAN_MTU,VLAN_HWTAGGING,JUMBO_MTU,TSO4,TSO6,LRO,WOL_MAGIC,VLAN_HWFILTER,VLAN_HWTSO,LINKSTATE>
	ether bc:24:11:4f:82:0a
	inet 192.0.2.12 netmask 0xffffff00 broadcast 192.0.2.255
	inet 192.0.2.13 netmask 0xffffff00 broadcast 192.0.2.255
lo0: flags=8049<UP,LOOPBACK,RUNNING,MULTICAST> metric 0 mtu 16384
	options=680003<RXCSUM,TXCSUM,LINKSTATE,RXCSUM_IPV6,TXCSUM_IPV6>
	inet 127.0.0.1 netmask 0xff000000
